REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1001 Pine Street, Unit #1411)
Off Calendar Jun-26-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Petitioner.

The sale was confirmed at $306,050.00 subject to the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the petition (subject to receipt and review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Andrade.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-03-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon waives further notice to the Public Administrator and stated that they are asserting priority. The Court granted the petition appointing the Public Administrator (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
